title: Crispy Malaysian Almond Pancakes
description: These kid-friendly crisperies are nutty and crispy, featuring coconut milk and a touch of spicy pickle. They're perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: ground peanuts or almonds for topping (optional)

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine almond flour, coconut milk, lime juice, and sugar. Stir until well combined.
Stir in the finely chopped pickle to add a tangy flavor and texture.
If using nut butter for topping, mix it into the batter along with some of the pickle. Otherwise, add just the pickled ingredients to taste.
Heat a nonstick skillet or griddle over medium heat. Grease lightly with coconut oil or avocado oil to prevent sticking.
Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the heated pan and swirl around to make it thin. Cook until bubbles form on top and edges are golden, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and serve warm.
To serve, you can sprinkle with optional toppings like ground peanuts or a dash of nutritional yeast for vegan options.
